roles.content: Business ethics and corporate responsibility: A comprehensive examination of business ethics and corporate responsibility within Ethics & Moral Philosophy, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.

Critical perspectives on business ethics and corporate responsibility: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to business ethics and corporate responsibility.

Recent developments in business ethics and corporate responsibility: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of business ethics and corporate responsibility in contemporary philosophy.
